description:
Returns the real-time column list for one source table by querying the source. The response includes the current enabled and hashed flags, and the patchable fields. 

> Note: This endpoint works only for an existing connection that is in a 'Connected' state.

parameters.name: connectionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the connection within the Fivetran system.

parameters.name: schema
parameters.description: The database schema name within your destination

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: The table name within your database schema
